name: Sprite Forge
short_description: Create amazing sprites for your project. Your beautiful tile map in a couple of minutes. Simplify your life, automate the generation of beautiful sprites.
detailed_description:
Pixel Art generator!

Get creative, draw one picture, get hundreds of sprites for your projects.

Flexible interface settings, easily changeable, manageable palette of colors and parameters, the user has full control over the generation of sprites.

Popular App Features

Brush Setup With custom Generation Options.
Mirror reflection of a sprite - 3 types of reflections.
export images to a tile map.

Popular effects:

noise settings,
backlight settings.
The program has - level generation control, there is a layer, link all the functions and get beautiful sprites for your projects.
